info.title: Lumora Sleep Public API
info.summary: Pre-launch waitlist signup for Lumora Sleep.
info.description: Lumora Sleep is a pre-launch luxury sleep-tech brand. There is no commerce API. The only public operation is joining the waitlist, which posts an email to a third-party form service. Product and brand facts live at https://uselumora.co/llms.txt and https://uselumora.co/AGENTS.md.

servers.description: Third-party form service that receives Lumora waitlist signups.

post.summary: Join the Lumora Sleep pre-launch waitlist
post.description: Submits an email address to the Lumora Sleep waitlist. This endpoint is hosted by a third-party form service, not by uselumora.co. The only required field is a valid email. There is no payment.

200.description: Signup accepted by the form service.

email.description: Email address to add to the waitlist.

describes_you.description: Optional note about who the person is.

product_interest.description: Optional product the user is most interested in.
